title: memecylon polyanthum
intro: Memecylon polyanthum is a species of plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the May tree or May apple. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Memecylon polyanthum include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to soothe and protect the body from infections. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which are traditionally consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
